question: Design a `Book` class with private members for title (string), author (string), and price (double). Include a parameterized constructor to initialize these members and a public method `displayBookInfo()` to print all details.

test_cases.input:
The Great Gatsby
F. Scott Fitzgerald
10.99
test_cases.expected:
Title: The Great Gatsby
Author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
Price: $10.99

Title: Problematic Book
Author: Unknown Author
Price: $-5.00

errors: The Book class does not validate the price, allowing negative or illogical values to be stored and displayed, which can lead to incorrect data representation.
